basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Rishikesh Senior Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Rishikesh
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Rishikesh (AIIMS Rishikesh) Recruitment 2026: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Rishikesh has released the official notification for 1 Senior Technical Assistant (Technical Support – III) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Uttarakhand. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree (minimum three years duration) in Medical Laboratory Technology (MLT) with one year of post-qualification experience, Master's degree in Life Sciences, Medical Laboratory Technology, Biotechnology, Biochemistry, or Microbiology
qualification.details: Technical Support – III (Senior Technical Assistant): Bachelor's degree (minimum three years duration) in Medical Laboratory Technology (MLT) with one year of post-qualification experience; OR Master's degree in Life Sciences, Medical Laboratory Technology, Biotechnology, Biochemistry, or Microbiology. Desirable: Prior experience in clinical trials and proficiency in advanced laboratory techniques.

salary_details.details: For Technical Support – III (Senior Technical Assistant): ₹28,000/- + HRA (10% = ₹2,800)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Rishikesh Senior Technical Assistant (Technical Support – III) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Rishikesh to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Senior Technical Assistant (Technical Support – III) Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.all_india_institute_of_medical_sciences_: Bachelor's degree (minimum three years duration) in Medical Laboratory Technology (MLT) with one year of post-qualification experience, Master's degree in Life Sciences, Medical Laboratory Technology, Biotechnology, Biochemistry, or Microbiology

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Senior Technical Assistant (Technical Support – III) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the AIIMS Rishikesh Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download AIIMS Rishikesh Senior Technical Assistant (Technical Support – III) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Technical Support – III (Senior Technical Assistant): Bachelor's degree (minimum three years duration) in Medical Laboratory Technology (MLT) with one year of post-qualification experience; OR Master's degree in Life Sciences, Medical Laboratory Technology, Biotechnology, Biochemistry, or Microbiology. Desirable: Prior experience in clinical trials and proficiency in advanced laboratory techniques.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: For Technical Support – III (Senior Technical Assistant): ₹28,000/- + HRA (10% = ₹2,800)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Rishikesh Senior Technical Assistant (Technical Support – III) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Rishikesh to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Senior Technical Assistant (Technical Support – III) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Rishikesh Senior Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Senior Technical Assistant (Technical Support – III) post at AIIMS Rishikesh is 05 July 2026. Candidates should submit their applications well before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Senior Technical Assistant (Technical Support – III) in AIIMS Rishikesh?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Senior Technical Assistant (Technical Support – III) post in the AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Senior Technical Assistant (Technical Support – III) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Senior Technical Assistant (Technical Support – III) post is 35 years. Age relaxation rules may apply as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Bachelor's degree (minimum three years) in MLT with one year experience OR a Master's degree in Life Sciences, MLT, Biotechnology, Biochemistry, or Microbiology.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for Senior Technical Assistant (Technical Support – III) at AIIMS Rishikesh?
faq.answer: The salary for the Senior Technical Assistant (Technical Support – III) post is ₹28,000/- per month plus HRA (10% = ₹2,800), totaling ₹30,800/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for AIIMS Rishikesh Senior Technical Assistant Recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the AIIMS Rishikesh Senior Technical Assistant (Technical Support – III) Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Senior Technical Assistant (Technical Support – III) position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Technical Assistant (Technical Support – III) post includes a written examination followed by an interview. Candidates must qualify both stages.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the AIIMS Rishikesh Senior Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates can apply online through the official website of AIIMS Rishikesh. The direct apply link will also be available in the Important Links section of the notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location for the Senior Technical Assistant (Technical Support – III) post?
faq.answer: The job location for the Senior Technical Assistant (Technical Support – III) post will be in Rishikesh, Uttarakhand, specifically at the All India Institute of Medical Sciences Rishikesh.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, the Senior Technical Assistant (Technical Support – III) post at AIIMS Rishikesh is a contractual job type. Candidates should refer to the official notification for contract duration details.
